queries.question: Show a list of movies along with the directors and the distribution channels.
queries.sql:
SELECT
StreamingDetails.Platforms,
StreamingDetails.Movies,
Directors.Name
FROM StreamingDetails
JOIN Films ON Films.Title = StreamingDetails.Movies
JOIN Directors ON Directors.DirectorID = Films.DirectorID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?platforms ?movies ?name WHERE {
  ?streamingdetails a :StreamingDetails .
  ?films a :Films .
  ?films p:Title ?title_l .
  ?streamingdetails p:Movies ?movies_r .
  ?directors a :Directors .
  ?films p:hasDirectors ?directors .
  ?streamingdetails p:Platforms ?platforms .
  ?streamingdetails p:Movies ?movies .
  ?directors p:name ?name .
  FILTER(STR(?title_l) = STR(?movies_r))
}

queries.sql:
SELECT
StreamingDetails.Countries,

Films.ReleaseYear

JOIN Films ON Films.Title = StreamingDetails.Movies

SELECT ?countries ?movies ?releaseyear WHERE {

  ?streamingdetails p:Countries ?countries .

  ?films p:ReleaseYear ?releaseyear .

}

CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?platforms ?movies ?name WHERE {

  ?streamingdetails p:Movies ?movies_r .

  ?streamingdetails p:Movies ?movies_r .

  full: { SELECT ?platforms ?countries ?movies ?name WHERE {
  ?streamingdetails a :StreamingDetails .
  ?films a :Films .

  ?streamingdetails p:Movies ?movies_r .
